title: Lipsen
compiled_truth: Lipsen is an external contact at [Cisco](companies/cisco). Over the corpus period (2001-02-13 to 2001-07-31), Lipsen sent 5 and received 108 emails, totalling 113 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (4), [Jeff Skilling](people/jeff-skilling) (2), [Karen Denne](people/karen-denne) (2), [Steven J Kean](people/steven-j-kean) (2), [Chambers](people/chambers-cisco) (1).
